title: Peppery Crispy Pumpkin Croissant
description: This unique pumpkin croissant is designed for solo dinners and features a peppery flavor with an egg-free-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: Pumpkin seeds or quinoa flakes for garnish (optional)

instructions: Cut the pumpkin into small pieces and steam them until tender. Remove from heat and let it cool slightly.
In a blender, combine the cooled pumpkin, lime juice, garlic, mint leaves, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Blend until smooth.
Form the pumpkin puree into small croissant shapes using your hands or cookie cutters (if available). Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for about 15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before garnishing with seeds or flakes if desired.
Serve warm as a snack or dessert.
